SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF FEB-06-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-06-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JASON JUNGREIS, PLAINTIFF APPEARS IN PRO PER. DEFENDANT APPEARS WITH WIFE AND BUILDING MANAGER RYAN JOHNSON. EXHIBITS INTRODUCED BY BOTH PARTIES. CLERK: BERTHA PAREDES. NOT REPORTED. DEPT 525.
